body: assertFalse("/ not valid in domain", validator.isValid("joe@ap/ache.org"));
assertFalse("! not valid in domain", validator.isValid("joe@apac!he.org"));
assertFalse(validator.isValid("joe.@apache.org")); // . not allowed at end of local part
assertFalse(validator.isValid(".joe@apache.org")); // . not allowed at start of local part
translation: self.assertFalse(self.__validator.isValid("joe.@apache.org"))  # . not allowed at end of local part
self.assertFalse(self.__validator.isValid(".joe@apache.org"))  # . not allowed at start of local part
